December 2014 Learn how and when to remove this message Learn how and when to remove this message .mw-parser-output .infobox-subbox .mw-parser-output .infobox-3cols-child .mw-parser-output .infobox .navbar screen screen and prefers-color-scheme:dark min-width:640px body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table caption body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table tbody body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table th,body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table td Jamal Akachar Personal information Date of birth 1982-10-14 14 October 1982 age 43 Place of birth Breda , Netherlands Height 1.85 m 6 ft 1 in Position Winger Youth career 2002 Ajax Senior career Years Team Apps Gls 2002 2004 Ajax 2 0 2004 2007 SC Cambuur 29 5 2007 2008 Moghreb Tétouan 28 5 Club domestic league appearances and goals as of 18 May 2008 National team caps and goals as of 18 May 2008 Jamal Akachar born 14 October 1982 in Breda is a retired Dutch - Moroccan footballer . Club career edit He started his career for Ajax , 1 where he made his debut against FC Groningen on 1 September 2002 while still an amateur and making a living as a taxi-driver. In July 2004 he left Ajax and moved to SC Cambuur and after 3 years in Leeuwarden he was released by the club after he spent a night in jail for alleged embezzlement. 2 He signed in January 2008 a 3-year contract by Moghreb Tétouan , but returned to the Netherlands after the club failed to pay his wages. 3 References edit .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3 body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2 body.skin-vector-2022 .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-3 .mw-parser-output .references data-mw-group upper-alpha .mw-parser-output .references data-mw-group upper-roman .mw-parser-output .references data-mw-group lower-alpha .mw-parser-output .references data-mw-group lower-greek .mw-parser-output .references data-mw-group lower-roman .mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-upper-alpha .references .mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-upper-roman .references .mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-alpha .references .mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-greek .references .mw-parser-output div.reflist-liststyle-lower-roman .references Jamal Akachar: spits en taxichauffeur Archived 2015-05-22 at the Wayback Machine - AFCA in Dutch Cambuur-spits Akachar opgepakt - Trouw in Dutch Akachar probeert contract te verdienen in Emmen - Voetbal International in Dutch External links edit Career stats - Voetbal International in Dutch .mw-parser-output .asbox .mw-parser-output .asbox table .mw-parser-output .asbox p .mw-parser-output .asbox p p .mw-parser-output .asbox-body .mw-parser-output .asbox-note .mw-parser-output .asbox .navbar .mw-parser-output :not p :not .asbox style .asbox,.mw-parser-output :not p :not .asbox link .asbox This biographical article related to association football in Morocco, about a midfielder, is a stub .
